personas.name: Value-Seeking Budgeter
personas.description: A long-term user or new seeker who is discouraged by high subscription costs and the locking of historical data behind paywalls.
goals: Access mental health tracking without high financial barriers
Retain access to previously entered personal data
pain_points: Sudden paywalls on features that were previously free
High subscription prices compared to perceived app value
Feeling exploited when seeking mental health support
context: Searching for affordable alternatives to expensive mood trackers
Evaluating if premium features justify the monthly cost
constraints: Strictly limited budget for digital wellness tools
Will uninstall if historical data is held 'hostage' by a paywall
personas.notes: Refined name to reflect 'Value-Seeking' rather than just 'Frustrated'. Grounded pain points in the specific feedback found in reviews.

personas.name: Global Experience Evaluator
personas.description: A user focused on the day-to-day usability of the app, specifically concerned with language accessibility and interface navigation.
goals: Use the app in their native or preferred language
Maintain a consistent daily check-in routine with minimal friction
pain_points: Inability to change the application language settings
General navigation issues that hinder quick mood tracking
context: Using the app for daily mental health check-ins
Navigating settings to customize the user experience
constraints: Requires multi-language support for full comprehension
Limited time for data entry during the day
personas.notes: Focused the persona on language barriers and daily routine consistency based on group hybrid_G2 reviews.

personas.name: Insight-Driven Self-Tracker
personas.description: A proactive user who utilizes the app to identify patterns in their mental health and expects nuanced emotional descriptors.
goals: Receive comprehensive reports on overall mental health trends
Find specific content/courses that match their current emotional state
pain_points: Limited emotional vocabulary (e.g., missing 'stressed' as an option)
Desire for more in-depth data analysis over time
context: Reviewing weekly or monthly mental health reports
Engaging with educational material to improve physical and mental strength
constraints: Expects data-driven insights rather than just simple logging
Requires privacy for sensitive emotional data
personas.notes: Updated goals to include matching content to feelings and refined pain points to include the specific 'missing labels' feedback.

personas.name: Stability-First Daily User
personas.description: A long-term user whose trust is eroded by persistent bugs, intrusive review prompts, and login failures.
goals: Maintain a multi-year streak of tracking without data loss
Experience a bug-free interface during daily interactions
pain_points: Intrusive and repetitive requests to leave reviews
Technical failures in the logging process
context: Long-term usage (2+ years) of the application
Responding to system prompts and update notifications
constraints: Low tolerance for workflow interruptions (like pop-ups)
Reliance on stable software for consistent habit-building
personas.notes: Added the specific pain point of 'repetitive review requests' which was prominent in the G4 review group.

personas.name: Clinical Transitioner
personas.description: A user who views the app as a bridge to professional clinical care and expects seamless transitions to therapy.
goals: Use app-generated reports to inform professional therapy sessions
Upgrade to premium features to access clinical-grade support
pain_points: Technical errors preventing the purchase of premium memberships
Lack of response or resolution from support regarding billing bugs
context: Transitioning from self-help tracking to seeking a professional therapist
Researching apps that integrate with clinical services
constraints: Needs reliable payment processing to access critical features
Depends on the accuracy of 'therapy reports' generated by the app
personas.notes: Focused on more specific user friction instead of access to clinical support outside of the scope of the app
